name: GLAXO SMITH KLINE
summary: GLAXO SMITH KLINE is likely referring to GlaxoSmithKline Egypt S.A.E., which is the Egyptian subsidiary of the global pharmaceutical company GlaxoSmithKline. It develops, manufactures, and markets a range of pharmaceutical products, vaccines, and consumer healthcare products within Egypt. GlaxoSmithKline Egypt is located in Egypt.
